inputs.name: projectPath
inputs.description: Absolute path to the selected project root.

inputs.name: repositoryPath
inputs.description: Resolved repository identity hint for the selected project.

inputs.name: uiMasterDescription
inputs.description: Concrete UI task brief entered by the user.

inputs.name: uiMasterCommandIds
inputs.description: Ordered UI Master command identifiers selected for this run.

inputs.name: sceneKey
inputs.description: Resolved task preset scene key for the current UI Master run.

inputs.name: targetScopeMarkdown
inputs.description: Frontend-composed markdown scope block built from selected repositories and their access labels.

inputs.name: referenceVaults
inputs.description: Optional supplemental vault references resolved from the preset task selection.

inputs.name: targetProjects
inputs.description: Optional supplemental cross-project references resolved from the preset task selection.
